task_completion.description: Create the Q4_Requirements.txt document with the specified hardware requirements.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window showing the file '/home/ga/Documents/Q4_Requirements.txt' containing the text '1. 50x Enterprise Laptops, 2. 50x Desktop Monitors'.

task_completion.description: Create an Account named 'Global Tech Industries' in SuiteCRM.
task_completion.visual_evidence: SuiteCRM interface showing an Account record successfully created with the name 'Global Tech Industries'.

task_completion.description: Archive an external email with the correct sender, recipient, subject, and body.
task_completion.visual_evidence: SuiteCRM email view showing an archived email with sender 'jane.doe@globaltech.com', recipient 'support@ourcompany.com', subject 'URGENT: Q4 Procurement Requirements', and a body containing the phrase 'hardware refresh'.

task_completion.description: Ensure the archived email is related to the 'Global Tech Industries' Account.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The email record in SuiteCRM shows 'Global Tech Industries' in the 'Related To' field, or the email is visibly listed under the 'Global Tech Industries' Account's History or Emails subpanel.

task_completion.description: Include the 'Q4_Requirements.txt' file as an attachment to the archived email.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The email record in SuiteCRM shows 'Q4_Requirements.txt' listed in the attachments section of the email.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the SuiteCRM GUI to create the account and archive the email.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the SuiteCRM web interface being navigated and forms being filled out, rather than terminal commands or API scripts executing the CRM actions.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely created the text file using a text editor or standard terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a text editor (like gedit, nano) or standard shell commands (like echo) being used to create the text file.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the SuiteCRM records.
integrity.visual_evidence: No browser developer tools (Inspect Element) are open in the screenshots showing the final SuiteCRM records.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Account Name: 'Global Tech Industries'. Expected Email Subject: 'URGENT: Q4 Procurement Requirements'. Expected Attachment Filename: 'Q4_Requirements.txt'. Expected Email Body Snippet: 'hardware refresh'.
